info.title: PDF API
info.description: HTML to PDF/A-3a conversion API with PDF/UA accessibility support and veraPDF validation

post.description: Converts HTML to a PDF/A-3a compliant document with PDF/UA accessibility. Returns the PDF binary.

post.summary: Convert and validate HTML to PDF
post.description: Converts HTML to PDF/A-3a and validates the result. Returns validation results and the base64-encoded PDF.

200.description: Conversion and validation result with base64-encoded PDF

get.description: Returns the health status of the API. Always accessible without authentication.

post.description: Checks whether a PDF was produced by this API and returns its document UUID if found.

400.description: PDF content is empty or invalid

post.description: Renders a JSON template (with optional per-block data overrides) to a PDF/A-3a document.
Fetches the HTML at the given URL and renders it to a PDF/A-3a + PDF/UA document.
Renders HTML to a PNG or JPEG image. Returns the image binary.

get.description: Canonical JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) for the template rendering payload. The response is a JSON Schema document describing the Template type accepted by /render/template, with builder metadata under x-pdfUa.

post.description: Validates a PDF against PDF/A-3a and PDF/UA-1 standards using veraPDF. Send PDF binary as request body.

weight.description: One or more whitespace-separated [FontWeight] values, e.g. "400" or "400 700".

data.description: Per-block content overrides, keyed by block id. Object for most blocks; array of row objects for tables.
